title: The difference between Atheism and Agnostisism

transcript.text: Hey, this video is the difference between atheism and agnosticism.
I am doing this because I got a comment a couple days ago.
Somebody writes on my What I Think About New Age page and says,
You know, you sound stupid when you say atheism is a religion.
And my contention is that atheism is a religion.
And it's agnosticism that is not the religion.
Now, I've had a lot of atheists tell me this,
That, oh, no, atheism is not a religion.
Well, and none of these people have even tried to explain the difference between atheism and agnosticism
Because they don't know.
And I mean, I understand why they get pissed because they think they're like the anti-religion.
But they're not.
They're just, they're the anti-established religion of Christianity, you know, Judeo-Christianity
Who believe in God.
And, you know, if you ask these atheists why they're atheists, they'll go,
Oh, but the Christianians are so stupid because they believe,
They go into all the stupidity of Christianity.
And so it's a backlash against that.
But the definition, I haven't, like, looked up the definition of any of these.
I'm just talking out of my own logic.
But the definition of a religion is a group of people who decide that they all believe in something.
A religion is a belief, is a set of beliefs, what you believe about life and the afterlife
And God and your soul and all that stuff.
And so under that context, atheism is a religion because they believe that there's no soul,
That there's no reincarnation, that there's no God, that the universe isn't alive,
That you're gone forever when you die.
They believe that.
It's not that they don't know.
Because one atheist said to me on one of my videos,
Oh, but atheism is where you don't believe in God because you think there's a lack of evidence for it.
That's agnosticism.
Agnostics don't believe in God.
But they don't believe that there's no God either.
They don't believe in the soul, but they don't believe that there's no soul.
They don't know what they believe and they don't want to talk about it.
They just want to live their lives.
That's what an agnostic is.
An atheist believes, knows that there is no God and that there is no soul.
And it causes problems.
And that's why I have problems with atheists.
Atheism is the worst religion in the world.
It's worse than fundamental Christianity because you can't really, you can't talk to an atheist.
Well, I guess you could, but they're not as bad as, I mean, they're worse than the fundamentalist.
You can at least talk to a fundamentalist Christian or a Muslim about stuff.
Atheists just tell you.
No, but the problem is, you know, America, we're supposed to separate church and state.

And, uh, and it, it causes problems.
It makes, it kills science.
It makes science less quality.
It makes it biased.

The only people who believe in aliens and spirits are quacks.
I was like, what?
The only, the only, oh, quacks and weirdos.
